---
number-sections: false
---

# Practice 14: Evaluation and Experimentation {#ch-practice-14 .unnumbered}

**Theory connection:** [Volume I, Chapter 14](../chapters/14-evaluation.qmd)

Use this chapter as the practical companion to the corresponding theory chapter.
Recovered activities are linked where a strong match exists; other sections are
explicit development scaffolds for the next writing cycle.

## Precision {#sec-pr-14-precision}

Recovered starting point: [Classification Patterns and Evaluation Assignment](labs/classification-patterns-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-classification-patterns-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Recall {#sec-pr-14-recall}

Recovered starting point: [Classification Patterns and Evaluation Assignment](labs/classification-patterns-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-classification-patterns-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Sensitivity and Specificity {#sec-pr-14-sensitivity-and-specificity}

Recovered starting point: [Classification Patterns and Evaluation Assignment](labs/classification-patterns-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-classification-patterns-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Kappa and Chance Agreement {#sec-pr-14-kappa-and-chance-agreement}

Recovered starting point: [Classification Patterns and Evaluation Assignment](labs/classification-patterns-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-classification-patterns-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Averaging {#sec-pr-14-averaging}

Recovered starting point: [Classification Patterns and Evaluation Assignment](labs/classification-patterns-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-classification-patterns-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Rank Evaluation {#sec-pr-14-rank-evaluation}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment) and [Association Rule Mining](labs/association-rules.qmd#sec-lab-association-rules).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Evaluation of Numeric Predictions {#sec-pr-14-evaluation-of-numeric-predictions}

::: {.callout-note title="Practice development scaffold"}
Create an activity that makes **Evaluation of Numeric Predictions** observable through a calculation,
small implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or written interpretation.
Include a reproducible input, a checkable result, and one reflection question.
::: 

### Error Metrics {#sec-pr-14-error-metrics}

Recovered starting point: [Classification Patterns and Evaluation Assignment](labs/classification-patterns-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-classification-patterns-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Correlation {#sec-pr-14-correlation}

Recovered starting point: [Classification Patterns and Evaluation Assignment](labs/classification-patterns-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-classification-patterns-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Experimentation {#sec-pr-14-experimentation}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## On Efficiency {#sec-pr-14-on-efficiency}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.
